heading: Implementing actions in anticipation of entry into force; regulations
label: 3513 Implementing actions in anticipation of entry into force; regulations
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , , known as the Uruguay Round Agreements Act. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 103–465108 Stat. 4809section 3501 of this titleDec. 8, 1994

Uruguay Round Agreements: Entry Into ForceThe Uruguay Round Agreements, including the World Trade Organization Agreement and agreements annexed to that Agreement, as referred to in , entered into force with respect to the United States on . See note set out under .section 3511(d) of this titlesection 3511 of this titleJan. 1, 1995

children.text: the President may proclaim such actions, and
other appropriate officers of the United States Government may issue such regulations,

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: Any interim regulation necessary or appropriate to carry out any action proposed in the statement of administrative action approved under to implement an agreement described in section 3511(d)(7), (12), or (13) of this title shall be issued not later than 1 year after the date on which the agreement enters into force with respect to the United States.section 3511(a) of this title
